events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: staged materials for conductor selection & sizing, observed field condition is undersized for load + length (voltage drop). Work hasn't begun. Need to select correct tool/material/replacement approach and explain why observed choice is wrong. Since non-compliant, decision fail. Risk high/critical? Undersized conductors causing voltage drop and potential overheating, high. Component conditions: non-compliant (staged, not installed, so not installed-defective). percent_complete 0. value maybe 0. confidence high. findings, actions, rationale, references.
